post.summary: Sign in with Google One Tap
post.description: Validates the Google ID token on the server. Existing linked accounts receive a session immediately. New identities receive a pending signup token that must be completed via POST /v0/auth/complete-signup.

200.description: Google identity was accepted but profile completion is still required

204.description: Google identity matched an existing account and a session cookie was issued

400.description: Malformed JSON payload, validation error, invalid ID token, or the Google account email is not verified

409.description: A local account already uses the same email address

500.description: Unexpected database, Redis, JWKS, or Google OAuth error

post.summary: Resend the pending signup verification email
post.description: Looks up an existing email and password signup that is still pending and resends the same verification token with its remaining validity window. Returns 204 No Content even when no pending signup exists to avoid email enumeration.

204.description: Verification email was resent when a pending signup existed

400.description: Malformed JSON payload or validation error

502.description: Worker service rejected the verification email job or returned an invalid response

503.description: Worker service could not be reached

400.description: Bad request - Invalid JSON, validation error, or invalid/expired token

get.summary: List the authenticated user's active sessions
get.description: Returns every active session bound to the current user, marking the session used by this request with is_current=true. Sessions are sorted by created_at descending.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired session cookie

delete.summary: Revoke one of the authenticated user's active sessions
delete.description: Deletes the specified session from the server. The user must own the session; revoking another user's session returns 404. If the revoked session is the one used by this request, the response also clears the session cookie.

parameters.name: management_id
parameters.description: Public session management identifier to revoke

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired session cookie

404.description: Session does not exist or does not belong to the current user

post.summary: Start an email and password signup
post.description: Validates the requested email, handle, and password, stores a pending signup in Redis, and queues a verification email. The user account is created only after the token is submitted to POST /v0/auth/verify-email.

202.description: Verification email queued and pending signup stored

400.description: Malformed JSON payload or validation error

409.description: The email or handle is already in use or reserved by another pending signup

502.description: Worker service rejected the verification email job or returned an invalid response

503.description: Worker service could not be reached

400.description: Invalid TOTP code or TOTP not enabled
Invalid TOTP code or TOTP not enabled
Invalid TOTP code
Invalid TOTP code or temp token

post.summary: Complete an email signup with a verification token
post.description: Consumes the pending email verification token, creates the user account if the email and handle are still available, and then schedules background indexing. The token is only cleaned up after the database commit succeeds.

204.description: Verification token accepted and the account was created

400.description: Malformed JSON payload, validation error, or invalid verification token

409.description: The email or handle became unavailable before the account was created

400.description: Bad request - Invalid query parameters or validation error

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query for handle, display_name, or bio. Empty or omitted returns all users.

404.description: Not Found - No banner image to delete

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid image or validation error

413.description: Payload Too Large - Image exceeds size limit

404.description: Not Found - No profile image to delete

post.description: Bans the requested user account and returns the resulting moderation record.

ActionLogAction.description:
Action Log Action enum (stored in action_logs.action field)
Format: "{resource}:{operation}"

has_newer.description: Whether there are newer (more recent) action logs

has_older.description: Whether there are older action logs

ActionLogResponse.description: Response payload for action log response.

BanUserRequest.description: Request payload for ban user request.

BanUserResponse.description: Response payload for ban user response.

CheckHandleAvailablePath.description: Request payload for check handle available path.

CompleteSignupRequest.description: Request body for completing an OAuth signup after a provider login for a new user.

display_name.description:
Display name shown in the UI.

- Length: 1-50 characters
- Unicode letters, spaces, and punctuation are permitted
- Emoji, control characters, and invisible Unicode are not allowed

handle.description:
Unique user handle.

- Length: 4–15 characters
- Allowed characters: `a-z`, `A-Z`, `0-9`, `_`
- Cannot start or end with `_`
- No consecutive underscores (`__`)
- Reserved words are not allowed (e.g. `admin`, `support`, `help`, `system`)

pending_token.description: Pending signup token (returned during OAuth sign-in)

token.description: Email change token (?token= value from the email link)

CreateUserRequest.description: Request body for starting an email and password signup.
